mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM report_record
deleted = 0
AND task_id = #{taskId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM report_record WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM report_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND report_type = #{reportType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
